justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently proposed reasonable alternatives when the requested slots were unavailable, offering options to check other times, days, or contact mediums.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and did not ask for information the user had already provided, leading to a smooth conversation flow.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction felt mostly fine, with the agent being polite and apologetic for the difficulties in finding a slot, though the repeated apologies could be a minor friction point.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well and expanded the search intelligently when initial requests were unavailable, although it took several turns to find an available slot.
